email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Performance marketeer bij Office Roeselare. Uw oproep voor een jonge, ambitieuze marketeer die verantwoordelijkheid neemt en campagnes optimaliseert, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

Bij Episto beheer ik Google Ads, Meta Ads en LinkedIn Ads voor klanten, optimaliseer ik budgetten en richt ik tracking in via Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel en Google Analytics. Ik analyseer resultaten en vertaal deze naar concrete acties, met duidelijke rapportages. Daarnaast pas ik de nieuwste AI-ontwikkelingen toe in mijn werk.

Uw aanbod met flexibele uren, opleidingsmogelijkheden en doorgroeikansen spreekt me zeer aan. Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn kennis in te zetten voor uw klanten en mee te groeien met het team.

Ik voeg mijn cv en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop op een gesprek om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Performance Marketeer position at Office Roeselare. Your call for a young, ambitious marketer who takes responsibility and optimizes campaigns aligns perfectly with my experience.

At Episto, I manage Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads for clients, optimize budgets, and set up tracking via Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and Google Analytics. I analyze results and translate them into concrete actions, with clear reporting. I also apply the latest AI developments in my work.

Your offer with flexible hours, training opportunities, and growth prospects appeals to me greatly. I am motivated to use my knowledge for your clients and grow with the team.

I attach my CV and cover letter. I hope to discuss my motivation further in an interview.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Performance marketeer bij Office Roeselare. Uw vacature voor een jong en ambitieus marketingbureau waar verantwoordelijkheid en inspraak centraal staan, spreekt mij enorm aan. Mijn technische achtergrond in webdesign en SEO, gecombineerd met mijn groeiende ervaring in betaalde advertenties, maakt mij een sterke kandidaat voor deze rol.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto beheer ik zelfstandig Google Ads, Meta Ads en LinkedIn Ads voor diverse klanten. Ik optimaliseer advertentiebudgetten, richt tracking correct in via Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel en Google Analytics, en analyseer resultaten om datagestuurde optimalisaties door te voeren. Daarnaast bouw ik duidelijke rapportages voor klanten en denk ik strategisch mee over campagnestrategieën. Mijn ervaring met SEO en GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) stelt mij in staat om ook de nieuwste ontwikkelingen in AI-gestuurde marketing toe te passen.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Office Roeselare is de focus op samenwerking en doorgroeimogelijkheden. Ik ben leergierig en volg de nieuwste trends in online marketing en AI op de voet. Uw aanbod met flexibele werkuren, opleidingen en een cafetariaplan sluit perfect aan bij mijn wensen.

Ik ben ervan overtuigd dat ik met mijn analytische vaardigheden, technische kennis en passie voor digitale marketing een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan uw team. Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Performance Marketeer position at Office Roeselare. Your vacancy for a young, ambitious marketing agency where responsibility and input are central appeals to me greatly. My technical background in web design and SEO, combined with my growing experience in paid advertising, makes me a strong candidate for this role.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I independently manage Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads for various clients. I optimize advertising budgets, set up tracking correctly via Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and Google Analytics, and analyze results to implement data-driven optimizations. I also build clear reports for clients and think strategically about campaign strategies. My experience with SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) enables me to apply the latest developments in AI-driven marketing.

What appeals to me about Office Roeselare is the focus on collaboration and growth opportunities. I am eager to learn and closely follow the latest trends in online marketing and AI. Your offer with flexible working hours, training, and a cafeteria plan perfectly matches my wishes.

I am convinced that with my analytical skills, technical knowledge, and passion for digital marketing, I can make a valuable contribution to your team. I hope to explain my motivation further in a personal conversation.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in performance marketing: managing Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads campaigns, setting up tracking via Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and Google Analytics, and optimizing budgets based on data analysis. At Episto, I run full-cycle campaign management for clients, from setup to reporting. I also have a technical foundation in SEO and GEO, which helps me stay ahead of AI-driven marketing trends. Comfortable across analytics, content management, and social media coordination; quick to learn new tools. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Performance marketing: Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, campaign setup & optimization, budget management, tracking (Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, Google Analytics)
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, data analysis, client reporting
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads campaigns for multiple clients: setup, budget optimization, and performance tracking
- Set up and maintain tracking via Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and Google Analytics to ensure accurate data collection
- Analyze campaign results and translate data into concrete actions; build clear client reports
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
